name: AXA S.A.
lede: AXA runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Pune, covering gbs, built over 31 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one AXA office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: AXA S.A. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: AXA runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Pune), covering gbs. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

about.description: AXA's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Pune, spanning gbs. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 22 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does AXA operate in India?
faq.a: AXA operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does AXA have GCC centers in?
faq.a: AXA's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru and Pune.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does AXA run in India?
faq.a: AXA runs gbs centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at AXA's India GCCs?
faq.a: AXA's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads AXA's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 22 leaders at AXA's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
